examples: To study the contents of trace elements and vitamins in wild and cultural Ligularia fischeri and its tender stem at Changbai mountain region.
Ligularia Cass with a wide range of medical value is distributed widely and a series of studies is carried out by scholars both at home and abroad.
We use L. virgaurea, one of the species in Ligularia Cass, and research the intra-inflorescence variation in flowers and seeds by sampling and investigate in field.
